March 10, 2026

Welcome to Side Quests To Freedom

Why I started this blog and what you can expect — honest guides on turning side hustles into real income.

  • intro
  • side-hustles

Welcome! This is your first blog post. Replace everything below the frontmatter (the --- block at the top) with your own content.

What is frontmatter?

The block between the two --- lines at the top of every post. It’s where you set the post’s metadata:

  • title — the post headline
  • description — a one-sentence summary (used in the blog listing and SEO)
  • pubDate — publish date in YYYY-MM-DD format
  • tags — optional list of topics
  • draft — set to true to hide a post from the site while you’re still writing it

Writing your content

Everything below the closing --- is regular Markdown. You can use:

Headings

## Section heading
### Sub-heading

Lists

  • Item one
  • Item two
  • Item three

Bold and italic

This is bold and this is italic.

Links

Link text

Blockquotes

A great quote or callout goes here.

That’s it — save the file and the post goes live on your next build.
